name: fucci-monorepo
description: Fucci monorepo containing mobile app and shared packages

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "red,blue" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --raw "cd services/api && go run main.go" "cd apps/mobile && yarn dev"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "red,blue" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --raw "cd services/api && go run main.go" "cd apps/mobile && yarn dev"
scripts.deploy:backend: cd services/api && go build && flyctl deploy --remote-only
scripts.deploy:mobile: yarn workspace fucci build:android && yarn workspace fucci build:ios
